text:
In message <075e01c17158$b4082d20$169e92d0@gosmalltalk.com>, Sean Glazier write
s:
>yes it does.
>
>-----Original Message-----
>State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
>State-Changed-By: iedowse
>State-Changed-When: Mon Nov 19 15:14:30 PST 2001
>State-Changed-Why: 
>
>Does this problem still exist?

Ok, could you provide details on which version of FreeBSD and X
you are currently running? The output of "dmesg" would be a good
start, but other information such as the type of video card and
video settings (resolution, colour depth etc) would be helpful. If
you haven't already done so, it would be worthwhile trying a newer
FreeBSD release to see if the problem is still present there.

Ian
